caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Hits Martinique Amid Light Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing heavy rainfall with 96% rain probability accompanied by light winds of 12 kt and wave heights reaching 3.0 ft from the southeast swell direction at 6 seconds. Roatan is seeing stronger winds up to 25 kt but lower rain chances, making Martinique the primary concern for today’s weather impact in the Caribbean.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Dubrovnik Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing moderate winds up to 17 kt with wave heights reaching 3.9 ft and a dominant west swell period of 5 seconds. Rain probability is high at 73%, creating wet conditions for the area while nearby Venice sees slightly lighter winds at 16 kt with less rain impact.
